steps.title: Add a new command `explain` to the CLI.
steps.description: - This command will print a summary of the file renaming algorithm to the console.

steps.title: Implement the logic for the `explain` command.
steps.description:
- I'll create a new file `src/cli/explain.ts` that will contain the text explaining the algorithm.
- I'll modify the main CLI entry point `src/cli.ts` to register the new command.

steps.title: Complete pre commit steps
steps.description: - Complete pre commit steps to make sure proper testing, verifications, reviews and reflections are done.

steps.title: Submit the change.
steps.description: - Once the new command is implemented and tested, I will submit the change with a descriptive commit message.
